name: Family Style Calzone
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons (up to 3 tablespoons) Italian salad dressing
8 ounces packaged lunch meat, any variety
Chopped green peppers OR Sliced olives (if desired)
recipeInstructions:
1. Unroll the pizza crust onto a greased cookie sheet.
2. Stretch the crust to a 15x10 rectangle.
3. Brush one half of the stretched crust with Italian salad dressing and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
4. Layer shredded mozzarella, lunch meat, chopped green peppers, and sliced olives (if using) over the dressing side.
5. Fold the crust over the toppings and seal the edge carefully.
6. Cut several small slits across the top to vent steam.
7. Bake at 425°F for 12 minutes or until golden brown.
